name: Brass Elbow 90°
shortDescription: Right-angle pipe direction change fitting for plumbing and industrial piping systems.
description: Precision-machined brass 90° elbow fitting designed for changing pipe direction at right angles. Manufactured from high-grade CZ121 brass with BSP threading for reliable, leak-free connections in water, gas, and pneumatic systems. Suitable for both commercial and residential installations.
applications: Domestic hot and cold water plumbing
features: Precision-cut BSP threads for leak-free joints
Compatible with PTFE tape and thread sealant
Pressure tested to 1.5× rated working pressure

name: Brass Equal Tee
shortDescription: Three-way equal bore distribution fitting for branching pipe runs.
description: Brass equal tee fitting providing a 90° branch from the main pipe run with equal bore on all three ports. Machined from CZ360 free-cutting brass for clean threads and high flow capacity. Ideal for splitting or combining fluid flow in plumbing and pneumatic systems.
features: Equal bore on all three ports for balanced flow
Smooth internal bore minimizes pressure drop

name: Brass Cross Fitting
shortDescription: Four-way pipeline intersection fitting for complex piping networks.
description: Brass cross fitting with four equal ports arranged at 90° intervals, enabling pipeline intersections in multi-directional distribution systems. Manufactured from CZ121 brass with precision BSP threads for reliable sealing under pressure. Commonly used in industrial manifolds and commercial HVAC systems.

name: Brass Union Connector
shortDescription: Dismantlable pipe coupling that allows disconnection without special tools.
description: Three-piece brass union connector enabling easy assembly and disassembly of pipe joints without rotating the pipe. Features a captive nut design with integral seat for reliable metal-to-metal sealing. Essential for maintenance-friendly piping installations.
features: Metal-to-metal conical seat for leak-free sealing
Captive union nut prevents component loss
No pipe rotation required for disconnection
Forged brass body for superior strength

name: Brass Hex Coupling
shortDescription: Heavy-duty threaded pipe coupling with hex body for wrench-tight connections.
description: Brass hex coupling with female BSP threads on both ends for joining two male-threaded pipes inline. The hexagonal body provides a solid grip surface for wrench installation. Manufactured from CW614N brass for excellent machinability and corrosion resistance.
features: Hex body for secure wrench grip

name: Brass Reducer Bushing
shortDescription: Inline pipe size reduction fitting for connecting different bore sizes.
description: Brass reducer bushing with male outer thread and female inner thread for stepping down pipe sizes within a fitting. CNC-machined from CZ121 brass with a hex shoulder for tool-tight installation. Provides smooth flow transition between larger and smaller pipe diameters.
applications: Adapting valve ports to different pipe sizes
features: Concentric reduction for smooth flow transition
Wide range of reduction ratios available

name: Brass Street Elbow 45°
shortDescription: Compact male-to-female 45° elbow for gradual pipe direction changes.
description: Brass 45° street elbow with male thread on one end and female thread on the other, eliminating the need for an additional nipple. Provides a gradual directional change with lower flow resistance than 90° elbows. Machined from CZ360 free-cutting brass for precision threading.
features: Suitable for gas and water applications

name: Brass Compression Fitting
shortDescription: Leakproof tube-to-thread connection using compression olive sealing.
description: Brass compression fitting providing a secure, leakproof connection between copper or plastic tubes and threaded pipe systems. Features a brass olive that compresses onto the tube for a reliable mechanical seal without soldering. Compliant with plumbing regulations for potable water systems.
features: No soldering or special tools required
Brass olive provides reliable compression seal
WRAS approved for potable water use
Compatible with copper and plastic tubes
Reusable — can be disassembled and reassembled

name: Brass Flare Fitting
shortDescription: High-pressure refrigerant line connector with flared tube sealing.
description: Brass flare fitting designed for high-pressure refrigerant and gas line connections using SAE 45° flared tube ends. Provides a vibration-resistant, leak-free connection suitable for HVAC/R and automotive applications. Manufactured from CZ121 brass with precision-machined flare seats.
applications: Automotive fuel and brake line fittings
features: Extended temperature range for extreme conditions
Precision-machined flare seat for optimal sealing

name: Brass End Cap
shortDescription: Pipe terminal end sealing cap for blanking off unused pipe outlets.
description: Brass end cap for sealing and blanking off unused pipe connections, test points, or future expansion outlets. Available in female (cap) and male (plug) BSP thread configurations. Machined from CZ121 brass with hex grip for wrench installation.
applications: Pressure test caps for plumbing systems
features: Hex body for secure wrench tightening
Available in cap (female) and plug (male) types
Solid brass construction for permanent sealing
Multiple plating options for aesthetic match

name: Brass Ball Valve
shortDescription: Quarter-turn full-bore flow control valve for water, gas, and air systems.
description: Brass ball valve with full-bore design and quarter-turn operation providing unrestricted flow when open and positive shut-off when closed. Chrome-plated brass ball with PTFE seats ensures long service life with minimal torque. Suitable for potable water, gas, and compressed air applications.
features: Chrome-plated brass ball with PTFE seats
Lever handle with visual open/close indicator

name: Brass Gate Valve
shortDescription: Straight-through flow valve with minimal resistance when fully open.
description: Brass gate valve offering straight-through flow with minimal pressure loss when fully open. Rising stem design provides clear visual indication of valve position. Ideal for applications requiring infrequent operation as a fully open or fully closed isolation valve.
features: Rising stem with clear position indicator
Solid wedge gate for positive shut-off
Low pressure drop when fully open

name: Brass Check Valve
shortDescription: Non-return swing disc valve that prevents backflow in piping systems.
description: Brass swing check valve with automatic non-return function to prevent reverse flow and protect equipment from backflow contamination. Spring-assisted disc closure ensures rapid response. Compact inline design suitable for horizontal and vertical installations.
features: Low cracking pressure for minimal flow resistance
Suitable for horizontal and vertical installation

name: Brass Globe Valve
shortDescription: Precise flow throttling and regulation valve for process control.
description: Brass globe valve designed for precise flow regulation and throttling control. The disc-to-seat arrangement allows accurate flow adjustment from fully open to fully closed. Ideal for applications requiring frequent flow modulation rather than simple on/off isolation.
features: Linear flow characteristic for accurate throttling

name: Brass Butterfly Valve
shortDescription: Wafer-type compact on/off flow control for large diameter systems.
description: Brass butterfly valve with wafer-type body for compact installation between flanges. Quarter-turn disc operation provides fast on/off control with moderate flow regulation capability. Lightweight design reduces pipeline loading while maintaining reliable shut-off performance.
applications: HVAC chilled and hot water systems
features: Lever or gear operator options available

name: Brass Needle Valve
shortDescription: Fine precision flow metering valve for instrument and gauge applications.
description: Brass needle valve providing extremely fine flow adjustment through a tapered needle and matched seat design. Multiple turns from open to closed allow precise metering control for instrument connections, sampling systems, and gauge isolations. Manufactured from CZ121 brass with precision lapped internals.
features: Tapered needle for ultra-fine flow adjustment
Lapped needle and seat for bubble-tight seal
PTFE packing gland for leak-free operation

name: Brass Safety Relief Valve
shortDescription: Pressure protection valve with adjustable set point for system safety.
description: Brass safety relief valve designed to protect piping systems and equipment from overpressure conditions. Spring-loaded disc automatically opens at the preset pressure to safely vent excess pressure, then reseats when system pressure falls below set point. Adjustable within a defined range for field calibration.

specifications.threadType: BSP Male Inlet, BSP Female Outlet

features: Adjustable set pressure within defined range
PED compliant for pressure equipment safety

name: Brass Solenoid Valve Body
shortDescription: Electromagnetic actuated valve body for automated flow control systems.
description: Precision-machined brass solenoid valve body designed for integration with electromagnetic coil actuators. Features accurately ported flow passages and seat machining for reliable automated on/off control. Available in 2-way normally closed and 3-way configurations for diverse automation requirements.

name: Brass Hose Barb Connector
shortDescription: Barbed hose to thread connection for flexible hose terminations.
description: Brass hose barb connector with serrated barb profile for secure grip on flexible hoses and BSP male thread for piping connection. Multiple barb ridges prevent hose blow-off under pressure when combined with a hose clamp. Available in straight, elbow, and tee configurations.
applications: Flexible hose to rigid pipe transitions
features: Multi-ridge barb design for secure hose grip
Available in straight, elbow, and tee forms
Food-safe brass alloy available on request

name: Brass Push-to-Connect Fitting
shortDescription: Tool-free tube insertion connector for rapid pneumatic and water lines.
description: Brass push-to-connect fitting enabling tool-free tube connections by simply pushing the tube into the fitting body. Internal collet and O-ring provide a secure, leak-free grip that can be released by pressing the release collar. Ideal for rapid assembly of pneumatic circuits and water supply lines.
features: Collet and O-ring for secure sealing
Suitable for nylon, polyethylene, and copper tubes
Reusable — connect and disconnect multiple times

name: Brass Quick-Connect Coupling
shortDescription: Snap-action pneumatic coupling for rapid tool and hose changeover.
description: Brass quick-connect coupling with snap-action latching mechanism for rapid connection and disconnection of pneumatic hoses and tools. Self-sealing valve in both halves prevents air leakage when disconnected. Industrial-grade design for heavy-duty workshop and production line environments.
features: Self-sealing valve prevents leaks when disconnected
Hardened locking balls for reliable latching

name: Brass Bulkhead Fitting
shortDescription: Panel and wall passthrough connector for sealed pipe penetrations.
description: Brass bulkhead fitting designed for passing fluid or gas lines through panels, walls, or tank walls while maintaining a pressure-tight seal. Features a lock nut and gasket assembly for secure mounting. Available with various thread and tube connection options on either side.
features: Lock nut and gasket for sealed panel mounting
Suitable for metal and plastic panels
Multiple connection types available on each side

name: Brass Pipe Nipple
shortDescription: Close or hex nipple for pipe extension and fitting connection.
description: Brass pipe nipple with male BSP threads on both ends for connecting two female-threaded fittings or extending pipe runs. Available as close nipples (minimum length), hex nipples (with central hex for wrench grip), and barrel nipples in various lengths. Machined from CZ360 free-cutting brass.
features: Available as close, hex, and barrel nipple types
Precision-cut BSP threads on both ends
Hex nipple variant provides wrench grip point
Free-cutting brass alloy for clean threads

name: Brass Male-Female Adapter
shortDescription: Thread type conversion adapter between different thread standards.
description: Brass adapter with male thread on one end and female thread on the other for converting between different thread types, sizes, or standards. Enables connection of BSP to NPT, metric to BSP, or other thread combinations. CNC-machined from CW614N brass to precise tolerances.
applications: Converting BSP to NPT thread standards
Connecting metric to imperial pipe systems
features: Hex body for secure wrench installation

name: Brass Swivel Joint Connector
shortDescription: Rotatable hose-to-thread union for tangle-free connections.
description: Brass swivel joint connector allowing 360° rotation at the connection point to prevent hose kinking and tangling. Internal ball bearing race and sealed joint enable free rotation under pressure without leakage. Ideal for hose reel connections and equipment with rotating service points.
features: Chrome plated option for visible installations

name: Brass Hex Bolt M6–M20
shortDescription: Fully threaded hex head fastener for corrosion-resistant assemblies.
description: Brass hex head bolt with full thread for non-magnetic, corrosion-resistant mechanical fastening. Manufactured from CZ121 brass per DIN 933 with precision-rolled threads. Ideal for electrical, marine, and decorative applications where steel fasteners are unsuitable.
features: Excellent corrosion resistance in marine environments
Available in polished finish for decorative use

name: Brass Machine Screw
shortDescription: Precision slotted and Phillips head machine screw for light assemblies.
description: Brass machine screw available in slotted, Phillips, and Pozidriv head styles for precision fastening in electrical, electronic, and decorative assemblies. Manufactured from CZ121 brass with rolled threads per DIN 84/965. Available in cheese head, countersunk, and pan head profiles.
features: Multiple head styles: cheese, CSK, pan
Multiple drive types: slotted, Phillips, Pozi
Bright brass finish for decorative applications

name: Brass Hex Nut
shortDescription: Standard and lock hex nut for non-magnetic, corrosion-resistant fastening.
description: Brass hex nut in standard and nylon-insert lock nut variants for secure, corrosion-resistant threaded assemblies. Machined from CZ121 brass per DIN 934 with precision-tapped threads. Non-magnetic and non-sparking properties make them essential for electrical and hazardous area applications.
features: Standard hex and nylon-lock variants available
Corrosion-resistant for outdoor and marine use
Compatible with brass, steel, and stainless bolts

name: Brass Flat Washer
shortDescription: Large surface load distribution washer for protecting soft materials.
description: Brass flat washer providing increased bearing surface area to distribute bolt/nut clamping loads and protect soft substrate materials. Manufactured from CZ108 brass sheet per DIN 125 with burr-free stamping. Prevents fastener pull-through and surface damage in electrical and decorative applications.
features: Stamped from solid brass sheet for consistency
Polished option for visible decorative use

name: Brass Threaded Rod
shortDescription: Full-length threaded stud in 1-metre lengths for custom fastening solutions.
description: Brass threaded rod with continuous ISO metric thread along the full 1-metre length for custom-length studs, hangers, and through-bolting applications. Manufactured from CZ121 brass with rolled threads for superior strength. Can be cut to any required length on site.
features: Easily cut to custom lengths on site
Rolled threads for superior tensile strength
Compatible with standard brass hex nuts

name: Brass Wing Nut
shortDescription: Hand-tightenable butterfly nut for tool-free assembly and disassembly.
description: Brass wing nut with two symmetrical wings for hand-tightening without tools. Ideal for applications requiring frequent assembly and disassembly such as access panels, inspection covers, and adjustable fixtures. Manufactured from CZ121 brass per DIN 315.
applications: Inspection cover and access panel fastening
features: Symmetrical wing design for balanced grip
Attractive natural brass or polished finish

name: Brass Anchor Bolt
shortDescription: Expansion anchor for masonry and concrete fixings in corrosive environments.
description: Brass expansion anchor bolt for secure fixing into masonry, concrete, and stone substrates. The expansion sleeve grips the drilled hole walls when the bolt is tightened, providing reliable pull-out resistance. Non-corrosive brass construction ideal for outdoor, coastal, and heritage building applications.
applications: Heritage and listed building restoration fixings
features: Expansion sleeve for reliable masonry grip
Suitable for concrete, stone, and solid masonry
High pull-out resistance in solid substrates

name: Brass Knurled Threaded Insert
shortDescription: Press-in knurled insert for creating durable threads in plastic parts.
description: Brass knurled threaded insert with diamond knurl pattern for press-in installation into pre-molded or drilled holes in plastic components. Provides strong, reusable metal threads in thermoplastic housings for repeated screw assembly. Available in straight knurl and tapered designs.
features: Diamond knurl pattern for maximum pull-out resistance
Reusable metal threads in plastic substrates

name: Brass Heat-Set Insert
shortDescription: Thermal installation threaded insert for thermoplastic components.
description: Brass heat-set insert designed for thermal installation using a heated soldering iron tip or dedicated installation tool. The insert melts into the surrounding plastic, and knurled features lock in place as the plastic resolidifies. Optimal for 3D-printed parts and injection-molded thermoplastic housings.
features: Thermal installation melts into surrounding plastic
Helical knurl locks insert after cooling
Compatible with standard soldering iron tips
Ideal for ABS, PLA, Nylon, and PEEK plastics

name: Brass Ultrasonic Insert
shortDescription: Vibration welded insert for high-volume injection molding applications.
description: Brass ultrasonic insert engineered for installation via ultrasonic welding equipment in high-volume injection molding production. Ultrasonic horn vibrations generate friction heat that melts the plastic around the insert for rapid, consistent installation. Features optimized geometry for ultrasonic energy transfer.
features: Optimized geometry for ultrasonic energy transfer
Consistent installation depth in mass production

name: Brass Press-In Insert
shortDescription: Cold press installation insert for plastic and metal substrates.
description: Brass press-in insert for cold installation into pre-drilled or molded holes using an arbor press or insertion tool. Serrated knurl provides mechanical grip without heat, making it suitable for heat-sensitive plastics and thin metal sheets. Simple installation process with no specialized equipment required.
features: Cold press installation — no heat required
Simple arbor press or hand tool installation
Suitable for thermoset and thermoplastic materials

name: Brass Self-Tapping Insert
shortDescription: Thread-cutting insert for soft materials without pre-tapping.
description: Brass self-tapping insert with external cutting thread that taps its own path into pre-drilled pilot holes in wood, soft metals, and plastics. Eliminates the need for pre-tapped holes, reducing installation steps. Internal ISO metric thread provides strong, reusable machine screw engagement.
applications: Speaker cabinet and musical instrument hardware
features: Self-tapping external thread — no pre-tapping needed
Ideal for wood, plastic, and soft alloys
Reusable metal threads in soft substrates

name: Brass Expansion Insert
shortDescription: Blind hole expansion anchor insert for high pull-out strength.
description: Brass expansion insert that expands into the surrounding material when the internal screw is tightened, providing high pull-out resistance in blind hole applications. Segmented body design allows controlled radial expansion for consistent clamping force. Suitable for plastics, wood, and composite materials.
applications: Blind hole fixings in composite panels
Retrofit thread inserts in plastic parts
features: Segmented body for controlled radial expansion
High pull-out resistance in blind holes
No special tools required for installation
Suitable for plastics, wood, and composites

name: Brass Precision Shaft
shortDescription: CNC-turned smooth shaft component available in custom lengths and diameters.
description: Precision CNC-turned brass shaft manufactured from CZ121 free-cutting brass to tight diameter tolerances (h6/h7). Ground and polished surface finish for smooth bearing engagement. Available in standard and custom lengths with optional threading, grooving, or cross-drilling per customer specification.
features: Custom lengths, threading, and features available

name: Brass Spacer / Standoff
shortDescription: PCB and panel spacing component with male/female thread options.
description: Brass spacer and standoff for maintaining precise separation between PCBs, panels, or components. Available in male-female, female-female, and male-male thread configurations with hex or round body profiles. CNC-turned from CZ360 brass with exact length tolerances for consistent stack-up assemblies.
features: Available in M/F, F/F, and M/M thread combinations
Hex and round body profiles available
Precise length tolerance for stack-up accuracy
Tin plated option for solder compatibility

name: Brass Dowel Pin
shortDescription: Precision alignment pin with h6/h7 tolerance for accurate positioning.
description: Brass dowel pin manufactured to h6/h7 precision tolerance for accurate component alignment and location in assemblies. Ground and lapped to ensure consistent diameter and surface finish. Chamfered ends for easy insertion into reamed holes. Non-magnetic construction for sensitive instruments.

name: Brass Sleeve Bushing
shortDescription: Plain bearing sleeve for rotating shafts with self-lubricating properties.
description: Brass sleeve bushing functioning as a plain bearing for rotating shafts, providing a low-friction, self-lubricating contact surface. CNC-turned from CZ121 brass with precision bore and outer diameter tolerances. Oil grooves can be added for enhanced lubrication in high-speed or high-load applications.
features: Precision bore tolerance for shaft compatibility
Optional oil grooves for enhanced lubrication

name: Brass Knurled Thumb Screw
shortDescription: Hand-tightenable grip screw with knurled head for tool-free operation.
description: Brass knurled thumb screw with diamond-pattern knurled head for secure hand-grip tightening without tools. CNC-turned from CZ121 brass with precision ISO metric thread and large-diameter knurled head. Ideal for access panels, instrument cases, and any application requiring frequent adjustment.
features: Diamond knurl pattern for secure finger grip
Large head diameter for easy manipulation

name: Brass Contact Pin
shortDescription: Electrical connector contact pin with precision-turned tip profiles.
description: Precision CNC-turned brass contact pin for electrical connector and socket assemblies. Manufactured from high-conductivity CZ108 or CZ121 brass with gold, silver, or tin plating for optimal contact resistance. Available in multiple tip profiles including pointed, radius, and flat for different mating requirements.
features: High-conductivity brass for low contact resistance
Multiple tip profiles for different mating styles
Precious metal plating for reliable contact
Swiss-type CNC turning for micro-diameter precision

name: Brass Compression Stop Valve
shortDescription: Inline service isolation valve with compression fittings for copper tube.
description: Brass compression stop valve for inline isolation of water supply services. Features compression inlet and outlet connections for direct jointing to copper tube without soldering. Quarter-turn or multi-turn operation depending on model. WRAS approved for potable water systems.
applications: Washing machine and dishwasher supply points
features: WRAS approved for drinking water systems
Integral compression olive for reliable seal

name: Brass P-Trap Body
shortDescription: Sanitary waste trap component preventing sewer gas entry, 32mm/40mm.
description: Brass P-trap body forming the water seal in sanitary waste piping to prevent sewer gases from entering the building. Available in 32mm and 40mm outlet sizes for basin and bath waste applications. Chrome plated for exposed installations with compression or threaded connections.
features: 75mm water seal depth prevents sewer gas ingress
Chrome plated for exposed under-basin fitting
Integral cleaning eye for blockage clearing
Standard compression connections for easy fitting
Available in decorative finishes for period properties

name: Brass Floor Drain Body
shortDescription: Recessed floor waste fitting with removable strainer grate.
description: Brass floor drain body for recessed installation in concrete or tiled floors to collect surface water and direct it to the drainage system. Features a removable brass strainer grate with anti-debris slots. Integral trap body maintains water seal for odour prevention in wet rooms and commercial kitchens.
applications: Wet room and shower floor drainage
Plant room and utility area drainage
features: Removable strainer grate for cleaning access
Integral trap body for odour prevention
Recessed design for flush floor installation

name: Brass Shower Arm Connector
shortDescription: Wall to shower head elbow fitting with decorative finish.
description: Brass shower arm connector forming the visible bridge between the in-wall water supply and the shower head. Typically an angled or straight tube with BSP male wall connection and BSP female shower head connection. Available in multiple decorative finishes to match modern and traditional bathroom aesthetics.
features: Integral flange covers wall entry point
Available in straight, angled, and curved profiles

name: Brass Water Meter Body
shortDescription: Precision flow measurement housing for residential and commercial meters.
description: Brass water meter body providing the precision-machined housing for turbine or volumetric water metering mechanisms. Features accurate flow passages, register mounting provisions, and BSP threaded connections. Manufactured from lead-free brass for potable water compliance with dimensional accuracy for meter cartridge interchange.
features: Lead-free brass for drinking water compliance

name: Brass Tap Spindle
shortDescription: Ceramic disc or rubber tap cartridge spindle for faucet internals.
description: Brass tap spindle serving as the central operating component of kitchen and bathroom faucets. Available in traditional rising spindle (with rubber washer) and modern ceramic disc quarter-turn configurations. CNC-turned from CZ121 brass with precision thread and spline features for handle engagement.

specifications.sizeRange: 1/2" BSP cartridge body, various stem lengths

features: Available in rubber washer and ceramic disc types
Quarter-turn ceramic disc for modern taps
Compatible with major tap manufacturer formats

name: Brass Cable Gland
shortDescription: IP68 rated cable entry gland for armored and unarmored cables.
description: Brass cable gland providing IP68-rated ingress protection for cable entries into electrical enclosures, junction boxes, and control panels. Available for armored (SWA) and unarmored cable types with integral strain relief and earth continuity. Nickel plated for corrosion resistance in harsh environments.

specifications.threadType: ISO Metric (M thread), PG, NPT options

applications: Electrical panel and enclosure cable entry
features: Available for armored and unarmored cables
Integral earth continuity for SWA cables
Neoprene sealing ring for environmental protection

name: Brass Terminal Connector
shortDescription: Pillar and tunnel type electrical terminal for wire termination.
description: Brass terminal connector block in pillar (vertical entry) and tunnel (horizontal entry) configurations for secure electrical wire termination. Precision-turned brass body with clamping screw provides reliable, low-resistance electrical contact. Available in single and multi-way configurations for distribution panels.

name: Brass Earth Rod Clamp
shortDescription: Tape-to-rod earthing bond connector for grounding systems.
description: Brass earth rod clamp designed for bonding copper earth tapes or cables to driven earth rods in grounding and lightning protection systems. Precision-cast or machined brass body with stainless steel clamping bolts for reliable, low-impedance earth connections. Designed to withstand fault currents without degradation.
features: Stainless steel clamping bolts resist corrosion
Designed for fault current withstand capacity
Compatible with standard driven earth rods

name: Brass Neutral Link Bar
shortDescription: Multi-way electrical neutral distribution bar for panel boards.
description: Brass neutral link bar providing multiple connection points for neutral conductor distribution within electrical panel boards and consumer units. Precision-machined from high-conductivity CZ108 brass with individually tapped and labelled connection holes. Available in 4-way to 20-way configurations.
features: High-conductivity brass for low voltage drop
Mounting holes for DIN rail or panel fixing
Tin plated option for enhanced contact resistance

name: Brass Switchgear Contact
shortDescription: Precision CNC-machined contact component for switchgear assemblies.
description: Brass switchgear contact manufactured by precision CNC turning and milling for use in circuit breakers, contactors, and switch disconnectors. High-conductivity CZ108 brass body with silver or silver-nickel contact tip for reliable arc resistance and low contact resistance over thousands of switching cycles.

specifications.material: CZ108 High-Conductivity Brass + Silver Contact Tip

Designed for high switching cycle endurance
